name: Seasoning Mixture for Brazier-Grilled Lamb
recipeIngredient: Raw eggs, beaten and placed in individual bowls
recipeInstructions:
This is a variant sauce with a slightly different cooking method.
These amounts are for individual serving bowls. Increase them to suit the number of diners. In this case, each diner grills the meat first, then dips it in the raw egg to coat, followed by dipping in the bowl of seasonings. Also served with steamed buns. If soy paste and sweet soy jam are unavailable, substitute peanut butter (or tahini) for the soy paste and black currant jam for the sweet soy jam.
